# Numeric Less Equal

Numeric less than or equal comparison

```perl
$less_eq = $a <= $b;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$less_eq = $a <= $b;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$less_eq = $a <= $b;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
